title: Incendium Language Fix
description: An unofficial addon which adds actual names to Incendium biomes on Xaeros, Minihud, etc.
body:
# Incendium Language Fix
A _language_ **addition** for **Incendium** to add actual names to the Biomes, for the users who use [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) or [Minihud](https://modrinth.com/mod/minihud), etc.

Note that this is only for Incendium and none of Stardust Labs other mods/datapacks.

<details open>

</details>
